brand.name: Samson
brand.tagline: The operating system for the modern church

headings.usage: All page titles, card headers, and modal titles. Use tracking-tight for sizes above 24px.

body.usage: General UI text, labels, form inputs.

data.usage: All financial figures, ID numbers, phone numbers, and dates in tables.

layout.density: High. Use h-9 for inputs and buttons by default to allow more data on screen.

tables.header_style: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-semibold bg-slate-50/50

cards.style: Flat with subtle border, no shadow by default.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4f6ef7] hover:bg-[#3b5bdb] text-white shadow-sm font-medium rounded-md h-9 px-4 text-sm transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 font-medium rounded-md h-9 px-4 text-sm

badges.style: Soft/Subtle background with dark text. No outlines.

universal_guidelines: Design for Density: This is an enterprise tool. 50k members means pagination, virtual scrolling, and compact rows.
Keyboard First: All primary actions (Save, Search, Close) should have hotkeys or be tab-accessible.
Financial Precision: Always right-align currency. Use JetBrains Mono for all dollar amounts.
No Gradients: Use solid colors and subtle transparency (glassmorphism) in headers only.
Micro-Animations: Buttons scale down slightly on click. Modals spring open. Rows highlight instantly on hover.
Data-Test-IDs: Every button, input, and link MUST have a data-testid attribute for testing.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI with the custom colors defined above. Override the default 'radius' to 0.3rem for a sharper, more professional look.
2. Implement the Sidebar with the dark navy background (#1a1a2e).
3. Create a 'Shell' layout component that handles the sidebar, sticky header, and main content area.
4. For the Dashboard, use a Bento Grid layout (CSS Grid). Don't just stack cards vertically.
5. Use Recharts for all data visualization. Customize the tooltips to be clean and minimal (white bg, shadow-lg, no border).
6. Ensure the 'People List' table supports 50 columns effectively (use horizontal scroll with sticky first column).
